element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Fundamental combat mechanic available from first match
Series-defining mechanic emphasizing weapon use over hand-to-hand
Fills passively as player receives damage; strategic timing of activation
Discovered through experimentation or arcade mode progression
Difficulty increases through opponent selection and mode advancement

typical_relief_triggers: Rage gauge activation and damage output
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Turn-based tempo with momentum shifts; tension builds through damage accumulation and Rage meter presence; relief cycles through successful defensive reads and counter-attacks

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introductory arcade opponents with basic patterns; establishes foundational combat mechanics
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Opponent AI complexity increases; special move prediction and timing become essential
difficulty_curve.late_game: Expert AI opponents with aggressive Rage gauge usage and advanced combo chains
notable_spikes: Final boss encounters in arcade mode
Difficulty jump when facing multiple opponents sequentially

notable_level_patterns.description: Progressive series of single-elimination matches against 8+ opponents of increasing difficulty; culminates in final boss encounter
Match pacing driven by Rage meter state transitions; defensive periods while meter builds, explosive offensive windows when activated
Each selectable character faces thematically or narratively relevant opponents in arcade progression
